top_weaknesses.issue: Visual walls on 300px column: opening graf, '消失的是下一阶的支出...' wage-list paragraph (~180 chars), the fiscal-stimulus + rate-cut analysis pair, and the closing 'do nothing' paragraph.
top_weaknesses.fix: Split the wage-spending list at '...首付。'; turn '财政刺激假设' and '降息假设' from prose into a 2-bullet contrast; tighten the closing reflection.

top_weaknesses.issue: '早期信号已经在那' bundles five distinct signal types (税收 / 房价 / 岗位 / 公司指标 / 支付网络) without a closing sentence tying them back to the 'velocity-of-money is below model' thesis.
top_weaknesses.fix: Add a one-line summary after the bundle ('合起来就是流通速度低于模型假设的同一签名'); consider H3s grouping the signals or trim one.

top_weaknesses.issue: Two H2s are slightly label-ish ('早期信号已经在那', '接下来要么建，要么不建') — readable but not maximally informational on the SERP.
top_weaknesses.fix: Sharpen to '幽灵 GDP 的三类可观测信号：税收、房价、招聘' and '两条政策路径：再培训缓冲 vs AI 红利回流'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Several rhetoric-heavy lines tip toward 宏观爽文 cadence ('趴在地上', '签名', '街上写的不是', '刹车踩到了油门上', '那是谁的问题').
top_weaknesses.fix: Pick the strongest two ('趴在地上', '街上写的不是') and demote the rest to plainer language.

top_weaknesses.issue: The aside '在中国语境下，可以替换为一线 IT 重镇与新一线城市的同类信号——同样的机制，只是名字不同。' is a meta-commentary insertion that breaks voice; some scenario stats (Mastercard 3.4%, ServiceNow 23->14%) read as borrowed.
top_weaknesses.fix: Either remove the meta-aside or split it into its own '在中国语境下' callout; mark forward-looking numbers as 'Citrini 推演'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Anchor text '自 2022 年底以来下降近 20%' is a bare-quantity link without naming the subject (年轻软件开发者群体).
top_weaknesses.fix: Re-anchor as '美国年轻软件开发者群体规模自 2022 年底以来下降近 20%'.

consensus_summary: All four personas score >=7; the title + H2 outline tells a clean concept->signals->politics->choice arc and ICP would share it on 即刻/公号. Remaining work is mobile-formatting (split the long paragraphs, especially the wage-list and tool-failure sections) and trimming the rhetorical flourishes that read as 宏观爽文.
